description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-copy-button` (T2-30). 3/6 libraries. NOTE: PR #175 required.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-copy-button/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, copy-value prop typing, feedback duration typing, success/error states
2. Accessibility — button label changes on copy success ("Copied!" announced to screen readers via `aria-live` or label change), keyboard activation, clipboard API failure handled gracefully, axe-core pass
3. Tests — copy success, copy failure (blocked clipboard), feedback state timing, reset after duration
4. Storybook — default, with value prop, success feedback demo
5. CSS — success state styling, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-copy-button/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-copy-button — T2-30 antagonistic quality review
